title: dimeria gracilis
intro: Dimeria gracilis is a species of grass in the family Poaceae, commonly known as a type of wild grass found in tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Dimeria gracilis include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and is often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various health conditions.
